name: 新星 | 暴怒野兽
descriptionEn: The Nova's rock-bottom price tag makes it a great ambush weapon for a cash-strapped team. It has been custom painted with a beastly creature in psychedelic colors. They call you The Oni, right? Such a scary name for such a sad man... – Elliot Kingsman, Mercenary
descriptionZh: 廉价的新星对于手头紧的玩家来说是一把不错的伏击武器。 这把武器使用迷幻色彩的残忍生物进行了自定义涂装。 他们称你为“鬼”，是吗？真是可悲的人用可怖的名字啊… – 雇佣兵埃利奥特.金士曼
